title: Generate JSON Data for a Job Description
scenario: Develop a prompt that generates JSON data for a job description that includes job titles, descriptions, requirements, and wages. The JSON output should be under 500 characters and include at least 3 job descriptions with their respective titles, descriptions, requirements, and wages.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for job titles and requirements

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated job description data, including job titles, descriptions, requirements, and wages.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 3 job descriptions with their respective titles, descriptions, requirements, and wages.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
